# VAULTX LLMs Context File

Welcome to VAULTX. This file provides high-level system context for Large Language Models (LLMs) interacting with the platform codebase.

## System Architecture
VAULTX is a unified security management and triage platform built on Next.js 14, Supabase (Postgres RLS), and Cloudflare Pages.

- **Frontend**: Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, and Geist Sans.
- **Backend / Edge Functions**: Server actions and Next.js Route handlers deployed on Cloudflare Pages.
- **AI Triage**: Fallback client supporting Anthropic Claude (primary) and Google Gemini (failover).

## Public Route Scopes
- `/` - Marketing Landing Page
- `/login` - Researcher/Org Authentication
- `/onboarding` - First-time user profile registration

## Dashboard Console Scopes
- `/dashboard/org` - Organization metrics, programs management, and triage boards.
- `/dashboard/researcher` - Researcher metrics, leaderboard rankings, and submission panels.
- `/dashboard/settings` - Accounts settings, dynamic API keys, and Slack/GitHub integration tiles.
